rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: Source-domain only; no LLM mechanism. Only 'pycnocline' matches as keyword (1, below kw>=2).
Progressive gradient flow targets N:M sparsity not interfacial dissipation between layer groups; below all thresholds.
Theoretical convergence analysis of weight-decay training; descriptive, not a prescriptive inter-layer barrier mechanism.

Rethinking Layer Freezing — layer freezing as a barrier against destructive backward gradient flow; identical end-state to PYCNO-DAMP's sill hard-stop (deepest layers receive at most epsilon gradient). Above sem and func thresholds.

Layer-Freezing Strategies — selective freezing prevents destructive gradient overwriting low-level/frozen early-layer features; matches PYCNO-DAMP's stated motivation (protect frozen early-layer features from high-amplitude bursts) directly.
GradES strategically freezes parameters by gradient signal — a gradient-aware barrier separating upper-layer dynamics from lower-layer parameter updates; equivalent function.
SmartFRZ attention-based layer-freezing framework — equivalent inter-layer-group gradient barrier; the 3-zone qualifier is a positional grouping over the same primitive.

Peri-LN normalizes at sub-layer boundaries constraining residual/spike magnitude — same artefact (inter-layer interface) and same effect (constrain gradient amplitude at boundary). Density-mismatch scaling parametrization is a re-skin of boundary normalization.

fail_reason: Five independent hits confirmed via semantic+functional channels. The PYCNO-DAMP primitive — passive inter-layer gradient dissipator that protects frozen lower layers from destructive upper-layer gradient bursts — is densely covered by 2025 layer-freezing literature (Rethinking Layer Freezing 2508.15033, Layer-Freezing Strategies 2509.05490, GradES 2509.01842, SmartFRZ). The 'density-mismatch' inter-block scaling at boundaries collapses to Peri-LN sub-layer boundary normalization (2502.02732). The 3-zone fjord-style stratification with sill hard-stop is a positional rearrangement of these established primitives — same artefact (inter-layer boundary), same effect (constrain/block gradient amplitude reaching lower layers). My independent kw/sem/func scores agree with the primary at all 8 ranks (within +/-0.03); honest concurrence with FAIL verdict.
